actionCalls.name: Log_Account_Net_Terms_True_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Account Net Terms True Error

actionCalls.name: Log_Commission_Already_Exists_on_Opp
actionCalls.label: Log Commission Already Exists on Opp

value.stringValue: Commission not created. Positive Commission already exists on Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Commission_Not_Paid_Setting_Rejected
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Commission Not Paid - Setting Rejected

value.stringValue: Commission Record is Not Paid and will be set to rejected.

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Getting_Commission_Rules
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Getting Commission Rules

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_in_Getting_Opportunity_Products
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error in Getting Opportunity Products

value.stringValue: Error Getting Commission Records related to the Opportunity

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Updating_Commissions_to_Rejected
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Updating Commissions to Rejected

value.stringValue: The linked Campaign on this opportunity is marked as Non-Commissionable. This means that there will be no commission created for this opportunity even if the employee is setup to get commission.

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Commission_Outside_Clawback_Period
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Commission Outside Clawback Period

value.stringValue: Commission Record is outside the clawback period and can not be removed from the employee.

actionCalls.name: Log_Referred_By_Not_Set_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Referred By Not Set Error

value.stringValue: Error Creating or Setting Commission Summary Record

assignments.name: Add_Value_of_Line_Item
assignments.label: Add Value of Line Item

assignments.name: Assign_Clawback_Flag
assignments.label: Assign Clawback Flag

assignments.name: Assign_Clawback_Flag_Same_Month
assignments.label: Assign Clawback Flag - Same Month

assignments.name: Assign_Commission_Record_Values
assignments.label: Assign Commission Record Values

assignments.name: Assign_default
assignments.label: Assign default

assignments.name: Assign_Effective_Date
assignments.label: Assign Effective Date

assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_out_Shipping
assignments.label: Assign Filtered out Shipping

assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_out_Shipping_and_Taxes
assignments.label: Assign Filtered out Shipping and Taxes

assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_out_Tax
assignments.label: Assign Filtered out Tax

assignments.name: Assign_Transaction_Commissionable_Found_Matching_Commission_Rule_and_Product_Fam
assignments.label: Assign Transaction Commissionable, Found Matching Commission Rule, and Product Family SHP

assignments.name: Clear_Found_Matching_Commission_Rule_Boolean
assignments.label: Clear Found Matching Commission Rule Boolean

assignments.name: Set_10X_Won_Chargeback
assignments.label: Set 10X Won Chargeback

assignments.name: Set_Commission_As_Rejected
assignments.label: Set Commission As Rejected

assignments.name: Set_Count_of_Commission_Type_of_Commission_there_are
assignments.label: Set Count of Commission Type of Commission there are

assignments.name: Set_Error_Outside_Clawback_Period
assignments.label: Set Error - Outside Clawback Period

assignments.name: Set_Error_Variables_Error_Creating_Commission_Record
assignments.label: Set Error Variables - Error Creating Commission Record

assignments.name: Set_Error_Variables_Error_Creating_or_Setting_Commission_Summary_Record
assignments.label: Set Error Variables - Error Creating or Setting Commission Summary Record

value.stringValue: Failed in Creating or Setting Commission Summary Record

assignments.name: Set_Error_Variables_Error_Getting_Commission_Records_related_to_the_Opportunity
assignments.label: Set Error Variables - Error Getting Commission Records related to the Opportunity

value.stringValue: Failed in Getting Commission Records related to the Opportunity

assignments.name: Set_Error_Variables_Error_Getting_Commission_Rules
assignments.label: Set Error Variables - Error Getting Commission Rules

assignments.name: Set_Error_Variables_Error_Getting_Opportunity_Products
assignments.label: Set Error Variables - Error Getting Opportunity Products

assignments.name: Set_Error_Variables_Error_Updating_Commission_Record_Rejected
assignments.label: Set Error Variables - Error Updating Commission Record - Rejected

value.stringValue: Failed in Updating Commission Record to rejected

assignments.name: Set_Partial_Refund_Flag
assignments.label: Set Partial Refund Flag

assignments.description: Since the customer initiated a charge back we need to create a chargeback commission record. What this means is that we will be negating the current positive commission record with this chargeback commission record.
assignments.name: Set_Type_to_Chargeback_Chargeback_Initiated
assignments.label: Set Type to Chargeback - Chargeback Initiated

assignments.name: Set_Type_to_Commission_Full_Refund
assignments.label: Set Type to Commission - Full Refund

assignments.description: Here we set the type for partial refund to refund. We do it here to ensure that the full refund goes thru the clawback check. Partials won't need to go thru this.
assignments.name: Set_Type_to_Commission_Partial_Refund
assignments.label: Set Type to Commission - Partial Refund

assignments.description: Since we won the Chargeback this will create the offsetting commission that would negate the pending chargeback item.
assignments.name: Set_Type_to_Commission_Won_Chargeback
assignments.label: Set Type to Commission - Won Chargeback

decisions.name: Do_We_Need_to_Update_Commission_to_Rejected
decisions.label: Do We Need to Update Commission to Rejected

decisions.name: Does_Account_have_Net_Terms_True
decisions.label: Does Account have Net Terms True?

rules.name: Yes_Commission_Found_Full_Refund_or_Chargeback
rules.label: Yes - Commission Found - Full Refund or Chargeback

decisions.description: We check if the Campaign is linked to the opportunity and we check if the campaign is commissionable or not.
decisions.name: Is_Opportunity_Linked_to_Campaign
decisions.label: Is Opportunity Linked to Campaign

decisions.name: Was_There_an_Error_in_the_Subflow
decisions.label: Was There an Error in the Subflow?

decisions.name: What_Type_of_Commission_Are_We_Creating
decisions.label: What Type of Commission Are We Creating

Flow.description: This will handle creating a commission record.

formulas.name: form_txt_Status
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!bool_ProductFamilySHP}, NOT({!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_SHP_with_the_Transaction_sou__c}), {!txt_Type}= "Commission", OR( ISPICKVAL({!rec_Opportunity.Transaction_Source__c},"POS"), ISPICKVAL({!rec_Opportunity.Transaction_Source__c},"Store") ) ) , "Pending Review" , IF(AND({!rec_Opportunity.CampaignId}="",{!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_Auto_Approved__c} = True, {!txt_Type}= "Commission"), "Commission Approved", IF(AND({!rec_Opportunity.CampaignId}="",{!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_Auto_Approved__c}= False, {!txt_Type}= "Commission"), "Pending Review", IF(AND({!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_Clawbacks_Auto_Approved__c} = True, {!txt_Type} <> "Commission"), "Commission Approved", IF(AND({!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_Clawbacks_Auto_Approved__c} = False, {!txt_Type} <> "Commission"), "Pending Review", IF(AND(NOT({!rec_Opportunity.CampaignId}=""),{!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_Campaigned_Opportunities_Aut__c} = True, {!txt_Type}= "Commission"), "Commission Approved", IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK({!rec_Opportunity.CampaignId})),{!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commissions_Campaigned_Opportunities_Aut__c} = False, {!txt_Type}= "Commission"), "Pending Review", "Pending Review")))))))

Flow.label: Autolaunch - Commission - Create Commission

textTemplates.name: txt_OutsideClawbackPeriod_Text
textTemplates.text: You cannot create a negative commission for this record because it is {!form_numDaysPastEffectiveDate} days old, which exceeds the clawback period of {!$Setup.AutomationControlSettings__c.Commission_Clawback_Period_Days__c} days.

variables.description: Variable used to unify all filtered data
variables.name: rec_OpportunityLineItems_Filtered
